option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".DashBoard">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="DashBoard Activity" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".DashBoard">
<include android:id="@+id/toolbarSection" layout="@layout/dashboard_toolbar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Dashboard Activity" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/toolbarSection" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.appcompat.widget.Toolbar xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/dashboardToolbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_dashboard_toolbar" android:minHeight="?attr/actionBarSize" android:paddingTop="0dp" android:paddingBottom="0dp" app:contentInsetStartWithNavigation="0dp" app:contentInsetStart="0dp" app:contentInsetEnd="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:minHeight="?attr/actionBarSize" android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<ImageView android:layout_width="22dp" android:layout_height="22dp" android:contentDescription="@string/dashboard_menu_icon_desc" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_dialog_dialer" app:tint="@android:color/white" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="1" android:text="@string/login_company_name" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="22sp" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnToolbarExit" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:background="@android:color/transparent" android:contentDescription="@string/dashboard_exit_desc" android:padding="6dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_lock_power_off" app:tint="@android:color/white" /> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.appcompat.widget.Toolbar>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Bulkcor 2.0</string> <string name="login_welcome">Welcome To</string> <string name="login_company_name">Bulkcor Trading LLC</string> <string name="login_subtitle">Login to your account</string> <string name="login_hint_username">Username</string> <string name="login_hint_password">Password</string> <string name="login_forgot_password">Forgot password?</string> <string name="login_sign_in">Sign In</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Bulkcor 2.0</string> <string name="login_welcome">Welcome To</string> <string name="login_company_name">Bulkcor Trading LLC</string> <string name="login_subtitle">Login to your account</string> <string name="login_hint_username">Username</string> <string name="login_hint_password">Password</string> <string name="login_forgot_password">Forgot password?</string> <string name="login_sign_in">Sign In</string> <string name="dashboard_menu_icon_desc">Dashboard menu icon</string> <string name="dashboard_exit_desc">Exit dashboard</string> </resources>
